Question: Find the slope of the line tangent to the graph of $$f ( x ) = \sqrt{x}$$ at $$x = 4 .$$
For $$f ( x ) = x^{2} ,$$ use a table to estimate $$f^{\prime} ( 3 )$$ using Equation 3.6 .

A rock is dropped from a height of $$64$$ feet. Its height above ground at time $$t$$ seconds later is given by $$s ( t ) = -16 t^{2} + 64 , 0 \le t \le 2 .$$ Find its instantaneous velocity $$1$$ second after it is dropped, using Equation 3.5 .

A coffee shop determines that the daily profit on scones obtained by charging $$s$$ dollars per scone is $$P ( s ) = -20 s^{2} + 150 s - 10 .$$ The coffee shop currently charges $$\text{$} 3.25$$ per scone. Find $$P^{\prime} ( 3.25 ) ,$$ the rate of change of profit when the price is $$\text{$} 3.25$$ and decide whether or not the coffee shop should consider raising or lowering its prices on scones.
